name: Sweet Potato Scrambled Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a pot of salted water (1/4 tsp salt to 1 cup water) to a boil. Add diced sweet potatoes and cook until tender, about 6 minutes.
2. Drain the potatoes well. Cook the bacon in a 10-inch skillet until crisp; remove and drain on paper towels.
3. Reserve 1 tablespoon fat in the skillet. Stir in the cooked potatoes and cook over medium heat, stirring frequently, until golden brown.
4. Mix eggs, ground red chiles, and salt. Pour mixture into the skillet.
5. Sprinkle with bacon and onions. As the mixture begins to set on the bottom and sides, lift it so that uncooked egg mixture flows underneath.
6. Cook until eggs are fully cooked but still moist, about 3 to 5 minutes.
